title: lathyrus filiformis subsp. ensifolius
intro: Lathyrus filiformis subsp. ensifolius, also known as the needle-leaved pea or needle pea, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is native to mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Lathyrus filiformis subsp. ensifolius include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
